narrative:
Chippewa Township has 6,865 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.5 percentage points.
